creator: kubito@gmail.com
text:
The patch looks sane, but I'm wondering how you were able to get Kopete
to build with Google Talk support at all.

I had to change kdenetwork4's Makefile to depend on net/linphone-base
instead of net/ortp, and even after that the build still failed at
another point in libjingle:

  kopete/protocols/jabber/googletalk/libjingle/talk/base/stringencode.cc:33:20:
  error: alloca.h: No such file or directory
